case_title: TIG INSURANCE COMPANY, A CORPORATION vs. CASTANEDA, MAURICIO et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TIG INSURANCE COMPANY, A CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT CASTANEDA, MAURICIO DOES 1 THROUGH 10 SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          JAN-08-1999 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  OCT-26-1998 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       DEC-21-1998
JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TIG INSURANCE COMPANY, A CORPORATION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CASTANEDA, MAURICIO $23,604.29 PRINCIPAL, $4,623.85 INTEREST, $126.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $28,354.14

OSC CALENDAR OF FEB-17-1999, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $300.00 FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON FEB-17-1999, TO ENTER DEFAULT JUDGMENT. OSC AND SANCTION AGAINST PLTF'S ATTY MICHAEL V MAHONEY, WHO IS REQUIRED TO FILE STATUS STATEMENT 20 DAYS PRIOR TO HEARING., PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE MAR-04-1999 CONTINUED FROM FEB-17-1999 TO APR-07-1999 AT 01:30 PM NOTICE SENT BY COURT

OSC CALENDAR OF JUN-23-1999, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $300.00 FOR FAILURE SANCTIONS AGAINST PLAINTIFF'S ATTORNEY MICHAEL V. MAHONEY FOR FAILURE TO FILE POS AND OBTAIN ANSWER FROM OR ENTER DEFAULT. DEFAULT CANNOT BE ENTERED UNTIL SANCTIONS ARE PAID., PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE JUL-08-1999 CONTINUED FROM JUN-23-1999 TO AUG-25-1999 AT 01:30 PM NOTICE SENT BY COURT

OSC CALENDAR OF AUG-25-1999, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $350.00 FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON AUG-25-1999, TO ENTER DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT. OSC AND SANCTIONS AGAINST PLTF'S ATTY MAHONEY MICHAEL, WHO IS REQUIRED TO FILE STATUS STATEMENT 20 DAYS PRIOR TO HEARING. NO ENTRY OF DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT UNTIL SANCTIONS ARE PAID., PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE SEP-09-1999 CONTINUED FROM AUG-25-1999 TO OCT-27-1999 AT 01:30 PM NOTICE SENT BY COURT
